team_name: ProTender  :- Intelligent Tender Evaluation & Eligibility Analysis System for Government Procurement
summary: Design an AI-powered platform for intelligent tender evaluation and eligibility analysis for government procurement, automating the extraction of eligibility criteria from tender documents and structured parsing of bidder submissions in diverse formats, while ensuring explainability, auditability, and human-in-the-loop design.
optimization_claims: Reduces evaluation timelines from days to hours
constraints_addressed: Heterogeneous bidder documents across multiple formats
